name: Meike 55mm f/1.4 AF Lens
description: A unique and versatile autofocus prime lens, the 55mm f/1.4 AF Lens from Meike is a reliable choice for capturing portraits and creating images with standout bokeh.

features.Key Features:: APS-C | f/1.4 to f/16 | 82.5mm (Full-Frame Equivalent) | Fast Aperture Everyday Prime | Autofocus Design | Multilayered Coatings | Micro-USB Port for Firmware Upgrades
features.What's in The Box?: Meike 55mm f/1.4 AF Lens (Sony E) | Front Lens Cap | Rear Lens Cap | Lens Hood
